steps.t: The Red-maid is in her sanctum within her fortress of Garth Agarwen. Dannasen instructed you to obey Radagast and take the pure water to the Red-maid'…
Dannasen is at the Eglan-camp in Agamaur. You should return to Dannasen and tell him that you poured the pure water into the Red-maid's Sanctum.
